title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
